text.title: Integration Testing Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to emit a validated integration-test-config from a service-graph YAML.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — Inventory services. Parse `templates/_smoke-test.yaml` or the project's service-graph.yaml. Validate each service has db_engine + external_apis. Confirm framework (fastapi/django/flask).

Step 2 — Pick isolation. Compute drivers (db_engine_required, commit_time_behavior_under_test, parallel_target, external_http_calls). Walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml`. Pick leaf: r-rollback-strategy | r-truncate-strategy | in-memory.

Step 3 — Wire conftest. Drop `templates/conftest_postgres.py` (or conftest_django.py / fastapi_client.py per framework) into tests/. Verify session-scoped container fixture + function-scoped session fixture (r2).
Step 4 — Emit factories. If parallel_target >= 2, switch factories to UUID-based unique fields (r5). Add `db` fixture dependency to every factory fixture so transactions roll back data.

Step 5 — Wire external HTTP. Per r-respx-pick or r-wiremock-pick, install respx or start a WireMock container. Stub each external endpoint named in service-graph. Run `scripts/validate-integration-testing.py config.json`; on exit 0, commit.
